meta.description: Learn about me, Diane Defores, and the story behind WinGlows and the Windows productivity courses I build.

hero.tagline: From Lifetime Deals to Productivity Tools
hero.headline: Hi, I'm Diane Defores
hero.subheadline: Solopreneur, Productivity Enthusiast & Windows Power User

story.title: My Story
paragraphs: My journey started in the lifetime deal (LTD) community. For years, I’ve been an active member, discovering and testing countless productivity tools that promised to make work life easier. Through that experience, I developed a deep understanding of what makes a tool truly useful in daily use.

This passion led me to create a productivity course on AppSumo, focused specifically on Windows productivity. The course was born from my own struggles to find comprehensive resources about maximizing Windows as a productivity powerhouse. I realized that while there are plenty of Mac productivity guides, Windows users often get overlooked.
WinGlows emerged from this gap. What started as educational content has grown into a suite of tools and resources designed specifically for Windows power users who want to work smarter, not harder.

mission.title: My Mission
mission.content: I help Windows users rebuild their workflow with the knowledge and tools they need to work with clarity and momentum. I believe everyone deserves practical productivity systems that actually work, not just polished features.

values.title: Practical First
values.description: Every tool and tip I share is tested in real-world scenarios. If it doesn't save you time, it doesn't make the cut.

values.title: Windows-Focused
values.description: I don't try to be everything to everyone. My expertise is in Windows productivity, and that's where I can go deep.

values.title: Community-Driven
values.description: My best ideas come from the community. The LTD community taught me the power of collective wisdom, and I continue that spirit today.

items.title: Productivity Tools
items.description: Windows applications designed to streamline your workflow and boost efficiency.

items.title: Training Courses
items.description: In-depth courses covering Windows productivity techniques, including my popular AppSumo course.

items.title: Resources & Guides
items.description: Free articles, tips, and guides to help you get the most out of your Windows setup.

cta.title: Ready to Boost Your Productivity?
cta.description: Join thousands of Windows users who have transformed their workflow with WinGlows.

footer.contact: Questions? Feel free to reach out to me at hello@winglowz.com
